title: Smoked Salmon Skewers
description: A simple yet elegant British-inspired dish featuring smoked salmon on skewers, perfect for a light lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Skewers
ingredients.amount: 10-12 wooden skewers, soaked in water for 30 minutes

instructions: Thread 2-3 pieces of smoked salmon onto each skewer, leaving a small space between each piece.
In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, and garlic.
Brush the mixture evenly onto both sides of the salmon.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Grill the skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Serve immediately, garnished with chopped parsley.
